gotcha: next.config.ts is silently ignored by Next.js 14 — it only reads .js or .mjs
fix: Rename to next.config.mjs and use ESM export default syntax

gotcha: Playwright's TypeScript types in this version don't expose test.todo() — causes TSC error
fix: Use test('description', async () => {}) with empty body for placeholder specs

gotcha: Vitest picks up scripts/migrate.ts and scripts/seed.ts at 0% coverage unless scoped
fix: Add include: ['src/**'] to coverage config in vitest.config.ts

gotcha: PowerShell treats (auth) in paths like src/app/(auth)/ as a subexpression and errors
fix: Always quote paths with parentheses: git add "src/app/(auth)/"

gotcha: src/lib/db/index.ts imports ./providers/pg, ./providers/supabase, ./providers/neon — missing files crash the build
fix: Create stub files in src/lib/db/providers/ that export the provider name and throw 'not configured'
